text.title: Shift Log Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: open_items omitted (must be present, even if empty array).
Any field contains a regex match for AWS / GCP / Anthropic / generic API-key patterns.

example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
next_operator.handle is 'team' (forbidden); pickup_first is generic; missing artefact_id, version, last_reviewed, shift_window, open_items, changes.
